meta.source: O'zbekiston Respublikasi Iqtisodiyot va Moliya Vazirining 286-son Buyrug'i (2025)
meta.document: Yashil iqtisodiyot loyihalarini baholash tartibi to'g'risidagi Nizom
meta.logic: Exclusions override all rules. If any exclusion matches -> project is NOT GREEN. Required rules must pass. Optional rules contribute to scoring.

evaluation_flow.step_1: Check exclusions (Section 16) — any match disqualifies immediately
evaluation_flow.step_2: Check if project requires mandatory complex expert conclusion
evaluation_flow.step_3: If yes to step_2 — verify expert conclusion exists
evaluation_flow.step_5: If threshold indicators exist — verify certificate or auditor conclusion
evaluation_flow.step_6: If qualitative indicators apply — verify sector-level compliance
evaluation_flow.step_7: Approved projects enter the green portfolio and are monitored

exclusions.description: Activity deemed illegal under Uzbekistan law, international conventions, or subject to international economic/trade/political/personal sanctions
Activity that damages, destroys, or alters UNESCO or state-protected cultural heritage sites
Production or sale of weapons and ammunition
Production or sale of alcoholic beverages and tobacco products
Gambling operations, casinos, and similar activities
Any activity contrary to ethical norms including sexual exploitation
Any activity related to nuclear power generation
Production or sale of radioactive materials (exception: state-approved medical devices and quality-control measurement instruments deemed insignificant and adequately shielded)
Production or sale of unbound asbestos fibers. Exception: bound asbestos cement products with asbestos content below 20%
Equipment that facilitates extraction of fossil hydrocarbon fuels under the pretext of energy efficiency improvements
Any coal-based project or investment initiative that involves coal use
Renewable energy projects applied during oil and coal extraction or operational processes
Cogeneration stations operating on coal or petroleum products
Use of nationally or internationally banned pesticides, herbicides, or fertilizers
Planting or introducing non-native invasive plant or animal species harmful to local ecosystems
Projects leading to excessive water consumption or depletion of groundwater in water-scarce areas
Chemical recycling of plastics — explicitly excluded from the circular economy category

EM1.name: climate_change_mitigation
EM1.description: Mitigation of climate change consequences — reducing greenhouse gas emissions, renewable energy, clean transport, energy efficiency

EM2.name: climate_change_adaptation
EM2.description: Adaptation to climate change — infrastructure and systems that help cope with climate impacts

EM3.name: sustainable_water_use
EM3.description: Sustainable use and protection of water resources — water efficiency, wastewater treatment, water supply

EM4.name: circular_economy_transition
EM4.description: Transition to a circular economy — recycling, reuse, bio-waste processing, waste reduction

EM5.name: pollution_prevention_and_control
EM5.description: Prevention and control of pollution — GHG emission reduction, dust-gas filtering, clean production

EM6.name: biodiversity_and_ecosystem_protection
EM6.description: Protection and restoration of biodiversity and ecosystems — reforestation, desertification prevention, ecosystem restoration

rules.name: wind_energy_generation
rules.description: Electricity generation using wind energy

rules.name: solar_energy_generation
rules.description: Electricity generation using solar photovoltaic energy

rules.name: geothermal_co2_emission_limit
rules.description: Geothermal energy: environmental emissions must not exceed 100g CO2e per kWh

rules.name: small_hydropower_capacity
rules.description: Hydropower projects up to 10 MW automatically qualify as green

rules.name: large_hydropower_co2_emission_limit
rules.description: For hydropower >10 MW: CO2 emissions must not exceed 100g/kWh (or see R06 as alternative)

rules.name: large_hydropower_surface_power_ratio
rules.description: For hydropower >10 MW alternative path: water basin production-to-surface ratio must be >= 10 W/m2

rules.name: renewable_heating_cooling_cogeneration
rules.description: Construction/operation of facilities using renewable energy for heating, cooling, or cogeneration

rules.name: grid_upgrade_for_renewable_integration
rules.description: Modernization of existing transmission systems or development of new ones to integrate renewable energy sources

rules.name: smart_grid_ict_implementation
rules.description: ICT/smart grid: control systems, automation, sensors, smart meters, AKT platforms

rules.name: renewable_energy_storage_system
rules.description: Energy storage connected to renewable sources (BESS, mechanical, thermal, electrochemical including green hydrogen, green ammonia, supercapacitors)

rules.name: concentrated_solar_thermal
rules.description: Concentrated solar thermal energy production or other solar thermal applications

rules.name: solar_or_geothermal_heat_pump
rules.description: Development/installation of electric heat pumps or absorption heat pumps powered by solar or geothermal heated water

rules.name: low_emission_vehicle_replacement
rules.description: Replacing vehicle/rail fleet with low-emission (CNG/LNG) or zero-emission (electric/green hydrogen) technologies

rules.name: zero_emission_vehicle_purchase
rules.description: Purchase or production of new vehicles and locomotives with zero direct greenhouse gas emissions

rules.name: ev_battery_production_or_purchase
rules.description: Production or purchase of lithium-ion batteries for electric and electric transport vehicles

rules.name: low_carbon_public_transport
rules.description: Introduction, purchase, and operation of low-carbon public/mass transport systems

rules.name: non_motorized_transport_infrastructure
rules.description: Development of non-motorized transport infrastructure (cycling lanes and pedestrian paths)

rules.name: ev_charging_infrastructure
rules.description: Introduction or installation of EV charging infrastructure including charging stations

rules.name: freight_truck_co2_emission_limit
rules.description: Freight trucks must have CO2 emissions below 50g CO2 per tonne-km

rules.name: green_building_certification
rules.description: New or existing building has EDGE, LEED, or BREEAM green building certification

rules.name: building_energy_efficiency_retrofit
rules.description: Retrofitting/renovation of existing buildings must achieve at least 20% energy efficiency or carbon emission reduction

rules.name: agricultural_process_energy_efficiency
rules.description: Improving energy efficiency of agricultural machinery, irrigation systems — switching to biofuel, CNG/LNG, or electrification; installing energy-efficient pumps

rules.name: greenhouse_conversion_coal_to_gas_or_electric
rules.description: Converting greenhouse heating boilers from coal to natural gas or electric boilers

rules.name: energy_efficient_technology_product
rules.description: Production/installation of energy-efficient technologies (LED lighting, heat systems, insulation materials) ensuring >20% energy efficiency improvement

rules.name: industrial_process_energy_efficiency
rules.description: Upgrading industrial/manufacturing processes to improve energy efficiency and eliminate energy losses

rules.name: energy_audit_conclusion
rules.description: Energy efficiency projects may be evaluated based on technical documents and conclusion from state-certified energy auditor

rules.name: water_system_improvement
rules.description: Projects addressing water scarcity, water quality improvement, water supply in scarce areas, water recycling, loss detection and elimination

rules.name: water_or_sewage_system_repair
rules.description: Repair of new or existing water and sewage systems; purchasing/installing water efficiency technologies

rules.name: wastewater_treatment_facility
rules.description: Wastewater treatment facilities, large-scale effluent treatment processes

rules.name: water_treatment_energy_efficiency
rules.description: Water recycling and treatment systems must achieve at least 30% energy efficiency improvement

rules.name: recycling_infrastructure_development
rules.description: Processes, infrastructure, and technologies aimed at recycling and waste management practices

rules.name: bio_waste_anaerobic_processing
rules.description: Anaerobic processing of bio-waste (manure etc.) to produce biogas, alternative energy, and mineral fertilizers (composting)

rules.name: closed_landfill_biogas_capture
rules.description: Projects that capture biogas from closed landfill facilities

rules.name: recycled_aluminum_content_threshold
rules.description: Aluminum-based consumer products must contain at least 65% recycled aluminum

rules.name: recycled_plastic_content_threshold
rules.description: Plastic products must consist of at least 65% recycled, renewable, and/or bioplastic material

rules.name: greenhouse_gas_emission_reduction
rules.description: Reducing greenhouse gas emissions in production/service processes via process upgrade, sensor installation, or third-party investments

rules.name: dust_gas_filter_installation
rules.description: Production, purchase, installation, and service of dust-gas filter products for GHG emission reduction

rules.name: biodiversity_preservation_reforestation
rules.description: Projects promoting biodiversity, preventing desertification, and restoring plants/trees in forests and farmlands

rules.name: degraded_land_reforestation
rules.description: Sustainable afforestation, planting, and care of trees in degraded and arid areas

rules.name: expert_conclusion_for_mandatory_category
rules.description: Projects in mandatory category must have a complex expert conclusion from an authorized body

rules.name: compliance_certificate_for_threshold_standards
rules.description: Where sector compliance threshold standards are specified, a valid certificate from authorized body or independent expert organization is required

dependent_rules.description: If project is in mandatory expert conclusion category, expert conclusion must exist; otherwise project cannot proceed
If project falls under any exclusion activity listed in Section 16, it is classified as excluded and cannot be green
If sector has defined threshold (quantitative) indicators and project must be green, a compliance certificate from an authorized body must exist
Hydropower >10 MW requires EITHER CO2 emission <= 100g/kWh OR surface power ratio >= 10 W/m2 (at least one must be satisfied)
If project does not meet compliance requirements and has no certificate, borrower must realign business plan / TIA documentation
If compliance threshold indicators for the project's sector change during monitoring, project must be removed from the green portfolio
If sector has qualitative (non-numeric) indicators and they are met, project qualifies at category/sector level as green
Energy efficiency projects with an energy auditor conclusion may skip full certification but still require technical documentation
